headline: CME Stock Nears 52-Week Low After a 19.8% Drop: Time to Hold or Exit?
summary: CME Group expands its product lineup and global reach while benefiting from electronic trading growth and strong capital returns.

headline: Homeowners tapped $47 billion in equity in the first quarter. What to consider before you borrow
summary: While high home values mean homeowners are sitting on an estimated $11 trillion in equity, it should not be viewed as free money, experts say.
